task_completion.description: Locate and open the security incident titled 'Unauthorized VPN Access from External IP'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface shows the incident 'Unauthorized VPN Access from External IP' being viewed or in edit mode.
A status dropdown or field for the incident is set to 'Closed' (or equivalent closed state) in the Eramba UI.

task_completion.description: Enter the required Root Cause text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Employee credentials were compromised in a third-party SaaS provider breach' is visible in a text input field (such as Root Cause, Analysis, or Comments) within the incident record.
The text 'Forced password reset for all 142 affected accounts. Enforced hardware MFA' is visible in a text input field (such as Resolution, Remediation, or Comments) within the incident record.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Eramba web application in a browser, not a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text into the Eramba application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The root cause and resolution texts are typed into fields within the Eramba UI, not a notepad or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or API calls from a terminal to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl commands, python scripts, or SQL queries used to update the incident.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target incident is titled 'Unauthorized VPN Access from External IP'. The software is Eramba Community Edition. Note: The underlying database schema may lack specific columns for root cause and resolution, which might cause saving errors or require the agent to use alternative text fields (like comments or description) in the UI. Award points if the agent visibly enters the required text into the Eramba UI, even if saving ultimately fails due to application errors.
